logs.heading: A0: Starting Jira sync task with monitoring

thoughts: I need to run the Jira reader script with specific filter and view IDs.
The script takes 5-15 minutes, so I'll start it in a background session.
I'll monitor progress by checking the log file up to 10 times at 30-second intervals.
On completion or failure, I'll trigger the appropriate notification script.
